macro.title: Zillow RESPA lawsuit paused after judge orders arbitration
macro.what: Federal judge orders arbitration for Real and The Frano Team and stays the consolidated Zillow RESPA lawsuit pending the outcome.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Darryl Davis Seminars sues Epique over POWER AGENT trademark
macro.what: Darryl Davis Seminars filed a federal trademark suit accusing Epique of using the POWER AGENT brand, seeking an injunction and profits.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Fannie Mae to expand title pilot program, Pulte says
macro.what: Fannie Mae will soon announce initiatives to expand its title waiver pilot program, Federal Housing Finance Agency (FHFA) Director Bill Pulte said Tuesday.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Mortgage applications rise 1.0% as rates hold near 6.6%
macro.what: MBA shows apps up 1.0% for June 19, 2026, as refis rose 3% and purchases slipped 1%
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Mortgage Rates Likely to Stay High For Now as Markets Digest Warsh’s First Fed Meeting
macro.what: Takeaway: He’s no one’s sock puppet! Now that Kevin Warsh has the job, he’s ready to make changes
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Most AI-altered listings go undisclosed, California law bans it
housing.what: More than 90% of altered images showed no visible disclosure language on the image itself, captions, listing descriptions or adjacent text.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Why we can’t get more housing construction in the US
housing.what: New home sales fell to 580,000 in May 2026, and elevated completed units for sale continue to limit permits and starts.
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: Trump abruptly delays signing of 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act
housing.what: Trump paused signing the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, saying he will act only after the SAVE America Act advances in Congress.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Flood-Prone Parts of America Are Losing Residents at Nearly Twice Last Year’s Rate
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Massachusetts court strikes rent stabilization bid from 2026 ballot
housing.what: Massachusetts’s highest court has blocked a statewide rent stabilization initiative from the November 2026 ballot on a technicality
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: NYC Suburbs and the Bay Area Are This Spring’s Most Competitive Housing Markets
housing.what: More than half of homes are selling above asking price in Newark, San Francisco, San Jose and Nassau County, making them the most competitive markets in the nation
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: U.S. Home-Price Growth Accelerated in May, Fueled by April’s Brief Mortgage-Rate Reprieve
housing.what: Home prices rose 0.3% month over month on a seasonally adjusted basis
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Housing Payments Hit 1-Year High, Sending Buyers to the Sidelines
housing.what: Pending home sales fell for the fifth week in a row, and new listings declined, too

housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

notables.title: Real Brokerage tops 35,000 agents across U.S. and Canada
notables.what: Real Brokerage passed 35,000 agents, added 3,200 in H1 2026, and says it has a presence in all 50 states and Canada.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: How real estate agents are losing deals — and what to do about it
notables.what: Slow or missed inquiries can cost agents two deals a month, or $192,000 a year, use tracking, follow up and automation to improve response.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.
